replacements.source:
Privacy Mode (Legacy)
No training and no storage. Background Agent and other features that require code storage will be disabled.
replacements.target:
隐私模式（旧版）
不训练且不存储。后台智能体和其他需要代码存储的功能将被禁用。

replacements.source: Your code data will not be trained on or used to improve the product. We will not store your code.
replacements.target: 你的代码数据不会被用于训练或改进产品。我们不会存储你的代码。

replacements.source: Your code data will not be trained on or used to improve the product. Code may be stored to provide features such as Background Agent.
replacements.target: 你的代码数据不会被用于训练或改进产品。代码可能会被存储，用于提供后台智能体等功能。

replacements.source: Privacy Mode (Legacy) is enabled. Background Agent and some features not available.
replacements.target: 隐私模式（旧版）已启用。后台智能体和部分功能不可用。

replacements.target: children:"添加一个智能体开始使用"

replacements.source: 不训练且不存储。Background Agent 和其他需要代码存储的功能将被禁用。
replacements.target: 不训练且不存储。后台智能体和其他需要代码存储的功能将被禁用。

replacements.source: 代码可能会被存储，用于提供 Background Agent 等功能。
replacements.target: 代码可能会被存储，用于提供后台智能体等功能。

replacements.target: 隐私模式（旧版）已启用。后台智能体和部分功能不可用。

replacements.target: label:"接受后跳到下一个差异"

label:"提交时启动智能体审查"
label:"智能体完成后自动运行"
label:"智能体审查包含子模块"

replacements.source: label:"Include Untracked Files in Agent Review"
replacements.target: label:"智能体审查包含未跟踪文件"

replacements.source: description:"After periods of inactivity, open the Agent Pane to a new conversation"
replacements.target: description:"长时间未活动后，将智能体面板打开到新对话"

replacements.source: description:`When enabled, ${Mo?"\u2318 + ":"Ctrl + "}Enter submits chat and Enter inserts a newline`
replacements.target: description:`启用后，${Mo?"\u2318 + ":"Ctrl + "}Enter 提交聊天，Enter 插入新行`

replacements.source: description:"Limit how many chat tabs can be open at once"
replacements.target: description:"限制可同时打开的聊天标签数量"

replacements.source: description:"Adjust the default behavior of sending a message while Agent is running"
replacements.target: description:"调整智能体运行时发送消息的默认行为"

replacements.source: description:"When to show the usage summary at the bottom of the chat pane"
replacements.target: description:"控制何时在聊天面板底部显示用量摘要"
description:"向智能体输入提示时显示上下文建议"

replacements.source: description:"Suggest a follow-up for the Agent"
replacements.target: description:"为智能体建议后续问题"

replacements.source: description:"Allow Agent to switch modes without asking first, such as Agent to Plan or Agent to Debug. When off, Cursor asks before switching."
replacements.target: description:"允许智能体无需先询问即可切换模式，例如从智能体切到计划或调试。关闭后，Cursor 会在切换前询问。"

replacements.source: description:"When launching Cursor, open Agents Window by default"
replacements.target: description:"启动 Cursor 时默认打开智能体窗口"

replacements.source: description:"Show terminal commands in compact view by default"
replacements.target: description:"默认以紧凑视图显示终端命令"

replacements.source: description:"The Explore subagent is used to do initial research for the main agent"
replacements.target: description:"探索子智能体用于为主智能体做初步调研"

replacements.source: description:"Allow Agent to search the web for relevant information"
replacements.target: description:"允许智能体搜索网页获取相关信息"

replacements.source: description:"Show inline diff decorations in the editor instead of only showing changes in the review panel"
replacements.target: description:"在编辑器中显示内联差异装饰，而不只在审查面板中显示更改"

replacements.source: description:`Automatically jump to the next diff when accepting changes with ${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}Y`
replacements.target: description:`使用 ${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}Y 接受更改时自动跳到下一个差异`

replacements.source: description:"Automatically format files when the agent finishes"
replacements.target: description:"智能体完成后自动格式化文件"

replacements.source: description:"Use the legacy terminal tool in agent mode, for use on systems with unsupported shell configurations"
replacements.target: description:"在智能体模式下使用旧版终端工具，适用于 shell 配置不受支持的系统"

replacements.source: description:"Show Add to Chat & Quick Edit buttons when selecting code"
replacements.target: description:"选中代码时显示添加到聊天和快速编辑按钮"

replacements.source: description:`Automatically parse links when pasted into Quick Edit (${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K) input`
replacements.target: description:`粘贴到快速编辑（${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K）输入框时自动解析链接`

replacements.source: description:"Use themed background colors for inline code diffs"
replacements.target: description:"为内联代码差异使用主题背景色"

replacements.source: description:`Show a hint for ${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K in the Terminal`
replacements.target: description:`在终端中显示 ${Mo?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K 提示`

replacements.source: description:"Use a preview box instead of streaming responses directly into the shell"
replacements.target: description:"使用预览框，而不是把响应直接流式输出到 shell"

replacements.source: description:"Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored."
replacements.target: description:"在语音模式中触发自动提交的自定义关键词。只允许单个词（不能有空格），标点和大小写会被忽略。"

replacements.source: description:"Control which network requests are allowed when commands run in the sandbox. Edit allowed/denied domains in sandbox.json in your workspace."
replacements.target: description:"控制命令在沙箱中运行时允许哪些网络请求。可在工作区的 sandbox.json 中编辑允许/拒绝的域名。"

replacements.source: description:"Use AI-powered command classification to intelligently match commands against allowlist patterns and suggest sandbox modes"
replacements.target: description:"使用 AI 命令分类智能匹配允许列表模式并建议沙箱模式"

replacements.source: description:"Commands that should always require user approval, even if they match allowlist patterns"
replacements.target: description:"即使命中允许列表模式，也始终需要用户批准的命令"

replacements.source: description:"Automatically review your changes for issues after each commit"
replacements.target: description:"每次提交后自动审查更改中的问题"

replacements.source: description:"Automatically run Review when Agent finishes and has made file changes"
replacements.target: description:"智能体完成且产生文件更改后自动运行审查"

replacements.source: description:"Include changes from Git submodules in the review"
replacements.target: description:"审查中包含 Git 子模块的更改"

replacements.source: description:"Include untracked files (new files not yet added to Git) in the review"
replacements.target: description:"审查中包含未跟踪文件（尚未添加到 Git 的新文件）"

replacements.source: description:"Choose between quick or more thorough, higher-cost analysis"
replacements.target: description:"选择快速分析，或更彻底但成本更高的分析"

replacements.source: description:"Prefix for new branches created by Agent (e.g., cursor/, username/)"
replacements.target: description:"智能体创建新分支时使用的前缀（例如 cursor/、username/）"

replacements.source: description:"Allow Agent to fetch content from URLs"
replacements.target: description:"允许智能体从 URL 抓取内容"

replacements.source: description:"Domains that Agent can fetch from automatically. Use '*' for all domains, '*.example.com' for wildcard subdomains."
replacements.target: description:"智能体可自动抓取的域名。使用 '*' 表示所有域名，使用 '*.example.com' 表示通配子域名。"

replacements.target: children:"你的工作树中有未提交的更改。请选择一个选项，然后继续。"

replacements.source: children:"Add a to-do to get started"
children:"Try a different search term or browse by category"

replacements.source: title:"Balanced quality and speed, recommended for most tasks"
replacements.target: title:"质量和速度均衡，推荐用于大多数任务"

replacements.source: description:"Create a checkpoint commit with your current changes"
replacements.target: description:"用当前更改创建一个检查点提交"

replacements.target: description:"将更改保存到 stash，稍后再恢复"

replacements.source: description:"Delete your current uncommitted changes before switching"
replacements.target: description:"切换前删除当前未提交的更改"
